prompt: Please audit the email file at D:/skillsMN/.claude/skills/email-audit/evals/test_phishing.eml and generate a security audit report. This email looks suspicious and I need to know if it's a phishing attempt.

assertions.name: detects_urgency_tactics
assertions.description: Identifies urgency language in the email (24 hours, account suspended, act now)

assertions.name: detects_ip_address_url
assertions.description: Identifies IP address in URL instead of domain

assertions.name: detects_header_spoofing
assertions.description: Identifies mismatch between From and Reply-To domains

assertions.name: generates_high_risk_score
assertions.description: Risk score should be HIGH or CRITICAL
